## Recipes.IRecipe.derivedFrom property

Optional derivation info - tracks lineage if this recipe was forked from another recipe (e.g., when editing a read-only recipe)

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly derivedFrom?: IRecipeDerivation;
```
